style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Venusaur's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished steel plates. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its armor seams, casting sharp blue-white light that fractures into prismatic shards. Metallic dust particles drift in slow motion, catching the light like scattered diamonds. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
